examples: Now. He began to pull the gun out of its holster.
Joe's hand felt for his gun, freeing it from its holster.
A woman renting out the costumes handed Mr. Ma a leather holster.
She sprays her clothes with bug repellent and slings a holster for her knife around her petite waist.
